description.value: The robot has an integrated @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial)] (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.Infiltrator's Toolkit (Tactical)] if it's at least 7th level) and an integrated @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.Hacking Toolkit (Commercial)] (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.Hacking Toolkit (Tactical)] if it's at least 7th level, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.Hacking Toolkit (Advanced)] if it's at least 9th level).
